g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about vehicle sensor data in Garuda')
sendPrompt('How does Garuda detect driver fatigue?')
sendPrompt('What environmental data does Garuda use?')
sendPrompt('How does Garuda BLE offline communication work?')
sendPrompt('How does GPS and camera feed into Garuda?')
sendPrompt('What does the preprocessing engine do in Garuda?')
sendPrompt('How does the multi-modal fusion engine work?')
sendPrompt('How does the risk prediction engine score risks?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI co-driver engine work?')
sendPrompt('How does safe path planning work in Garuda?')
sendPrompt('How does the emergency response system work?')
sendPrompt('What does the fog layer do in Garuda?')
sendPrompt('What does the cloud learning layer do in Garuda?')
sendPrompt('What voice alerts does Garuda give?')
sendPrompt('What does the Garuda risk dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('How does Garuda suggest safer routes?')
sendPrompt('How does Garuda send emergency SOS?')
